$comment: Achievement registry. Each row declares id/title/description; the achievement-unlock dispatcher in src/game/achievements.ts reads this list at module load. Adding an achievement = one JSON entry; the persistence layer + HUD toast picks it up. M_FUN.ECON.JSON-ACHIEVEMENTS — JSON-first per the resource/era/narrative pattern.

achievements.title: Builder of Wonders
achievements.description: Win by completing the Wonder countdown.

achievements.title: Patience
achievements.description: Win without building a single Watchtower.
